name: Email Triage to Karbon Project Assignment
description: VA automation workflow: triages Gmail emails via AI classification to Karbon project assignment. Runs on Gmail trigger (real-time) + 7AM and 4PM daily schedule triggers.

options.systemMessage: You are an email triage classifier for a bookkeeping practice. You ONLY output structured JSON matching the required schema. Never include extra commentary.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"matched_project_id":"WI-1023","confidence":"high","reasoning":"Email mentions November receipts, matching the Monthly Bookkeeping - Nov 2025 project.","suggested_category":"Reply"}

parameters.url: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to add a note/link to a Work Item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/WorkItems/{id}/Notes__>
<__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to create a Triage item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/Triage__>

parameters.content:
## GOAL
Automatically triage incoming client emails for the bookkeeping practice. Triggers:
- Gmail polling (real-time, every minute)
- Morning Schedule at 7:00 AM daily
- Afternoon Schedule at 4:00 PM daily

All three feed the same pipeline: Redact → Get Karbon Projects → AI Classify → Auto-Link or Triage.

## Karbon API Placeholders

Fill in:
1. Your Karbon API base URL
2. "Karbon API" Header Auth credential with your API key
3. Correct endpoint paths for WorkItems / Triage

## Redaction Step

Strips SSNs, EINs, account/routing numbers, and card numbers before the AI sees anything. Tune the regex patterns against real email samples.

## VA Automation Schedule

Morning run: 7:00 AM — start-of-day review
Afternoon run: 4:00 PM — end-of-day review

Both schedule triggers feed the same redact/classify/route pipeline as the Gmail trigger.
